description: **(S)** Add PR number validation and recovery in `create_and_review_pr()` — after line 2104, add: (1) validate `pr_number` is a positive integer, (2) if null/missing, query `gh pr list --head "$branch" --state open --json number --jq '.[0].number'` to recover, (3) if still null, log error and exit cleanly. Also make `pr_number` required in `implement-issue-pr.json` schema.

**(S)** Add BATS tests for PR number recovery — test cases: (1) pr_number extracted from structured_output normally, (2) pr_number missing triggers `gh pr list` recovery, (3) both missing triggers clean error exit, (4) non-integer pr_number triggers recovery
